algorithm: Load pi_Foam33 as a 33x56 matrix over F_p.
Load R_hc generators as 56x56 matrices or sparse deterministic maps.
For each generator g compute D_g = pi_Foam33 R_hc_g - R_Foam_g pi_Foam33.
Pass iff every D_g is zero.
Separately verify core restriction, bridge-kernel behavior, and cycle8/gamma8 response.
required_inputs: height/action-return operator matrices or deterministic rules
